speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , Tina , I ’ Ve got good news . I have successfully passed the first two rounds of interview with ABC Company . They informed me to go to the final round next Monday . It looks very promising .

speaker: speaker2
text: That is awesome . Congratulation ! I know you can make it .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . Let ’ s go for a celebration this evening . Are you free ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . Wait for me at the cafe down my office building . See 5PM , ok ?
